title: Psychotria articulata
taxonomy: Psychotria articulata is a species of plant in the family Rubiaceae, commonly known as the coffee family. This classification places it within the order Gentianales. The family Rubiaceae is a large and diverse group of flowering plants. Psychotria articulata is native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. Its classification provides insight into its evolutionary relationships with other plants within the Gentianales order.

intro: Psychotria articulata, also known as Artocarpus articulata, is a plant species native to the tropical regions of Central and South America, belonging to the Rubiaceae family.
